title: The Rotation of Unsaid Things
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: In a Peruvian village where unspoken resentments physically accumulate as black sediment in the communal well, a mute woman must find words for what she knows about the town's oldest secret before the well poisons everyone.
long_description: In a Peruvian village where unspoken resentments physically accumulate as black sediment in the communal well, a mute woman must find words for what she knows about the town's oldest secret before the well poisons everyone.
